description: Example least-privilege MCP Capability Firewall policy. Start default-deny, allow read-only tools, require review for external sinks, and deny shell execution.

rules.reason: Project listing is read-only and stays local.
Shell execution with destructive or download-and-run substrings is not allowed.
Shell execution needs human review even when no known destructive substring is present.
External network or message sinks need review because they can exfiltrate local context.
